backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that manages videos, contact form messages, user profiles, thumbnails, and custom domain verification, with role-based access control via mixins for storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that VideoManagementPanel.tsx was updated to make the title field optional, removing client-side validation and adding helper text indicating a default title will be auto-generated if left blank.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key functionality of each component, hook, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a monochromatic black/white/gray design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'MECT EW' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component with a two-tab layout for managing messages (MessageManagement) and configuring a custom domain (DomainManagement).
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Reusable contact form component with name, email, and message fields that validates input client-side and submits to the backend via the useSubmitContactForm mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/DomainManagement: Admin component for configuring and verifying a custom domain by displaying required DNS records (CNAME and TXT) and checking DNS propagation via Google's DNS API.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FormSpecificMess: Component that lists messages for a specific form type, allowing admins to reply to or delete individual messages via dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with logo, nav links, Internet Identity authentication, and an admin badge shown when the authenticated user is an admin.
frontend/src/components/ManualVideoUploa: Admin component for uploading video files (MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM) up to 2GB with title, category, file-type selection, upload progress tracking, and validation.
frontend/src/components/MessageManagemen: Admin component that displays all messages across form types with filtering by form type and status, and supports replying to or deleting messages.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/ScreenRecorder.t: A React component that provides screen recording functionality with microphone/system audio options, upload progress tracking, and video metadata (title, category) submission to the backend.
frontend/src/components/VideoGallery.tsx: A React component that displays a grid of videos with thumbnail caching, a playback dialog using streamed blobs, and admin-only delete functionality.
A placeholder component that renders a card indicating video management functionality is currently unavailable.
frontend/src/components/VideoManagementP: An admin panel component for managing videos with features including search/filter, delete, download, thumbnail upload/revert, title editing, and view count display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity and an admin token from URL params, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, covering user profile CRUD, admin checks, video listing/uploading/deleting/downloading, thumbnail management, view counts, contact forms, and stored messages.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines monochromatic grayscale CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, plus custom scrollbar and gradient text utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying a biographical description of the site owner's background as a technical analyst specializing in Elliott Wave Theory.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and an admin role check, rendering the AdminPanel component only for authorized users.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Analysis page showing financial market videos organized by category tabs; admin users additionally see tools for screen recording, manual video upload, and video management.
frontend/src/pages/ConsultancyPage.tsx: Consultancy page with a contact form for consultation requests and an admin-only message management panel for the consultoria form type.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a general contact form and an admin-only message management panel for the contacto form type.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Full-viewport hero page that displays a grayscale background image of financial markets with no additional content.
frontend/src/pages/MentoringPage.tsx: Mentoring page describing Elliott Wave mentorship offerings, with a contact form and an admin-only message management panel for the mentoria form type.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, font families, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 14) describing the MECT EW ICP-deployed web app's architecture, features, and known issues, including backend Motoko canister design, React frontend stack, and outstanding bugs.
